title: Liming Pang
entries: The combination of the 8 am lectures and theory/proof-heavy lectures made me not want to go to lectures after the first few weeks. If you're good at learning by yourself, he is worth taking because there is a very generous curve at the end.
CHOOSE HIS CLASS

Overall he's super nice and funny, but the lectures are chopped. You are required to watch lecture videos BEFORE the actual lecture and take a pre-lecture quiz. Then the actual lecture in-person is just him doing proofs.
notes are heavy but not useful
Nonchalant final boss

Amazing lectures with proofs, theorems, and examples organized clearly. Quizzes test general understanding, exams are very doable as long as you go through the lecture notes, and homework is helpful with understanding the material. Chill dude. Exam had a picture of a cat on the cover which was cute.
Super nice professor, posts notes after class, but I he has a very strong accent.

He is the GOAT for math no gonna lie, he gives very detailed explanation on every theory in class and gives good examples too. Beyond that, he keeps tests easy, you can tell he truly wants his students to succeed.
the absolute goat, did bad on my midterms and prob my final and goat still passed me

Great professor who truly wants students to succeed. If you do the practice exams, review quizzes and lecture notes, you'll be completely fine for the exams. There is also a decent curve at the end of the semester which helps a lot
Great guy. Loves cats. Practice exams are MUCH harder than the actual exam. Quizzes are pretty basic (like they don't test advanced knowledge of the section, just like very baseline stuff).
Goat. Take him.

Prof. Pang is an amazing straight forward educator. His lecture notes are very clear and organized. The homeworks were a bit heavy, but i think it's because we had only 6 weeks to complete the course over the summer. However, the homeworks were useful when studying for quizzes and exams.

Professor Pang is a very great Calculus teacher whose lectures are focused on dissolving rigorous definitions into digestible concepts whilst applying them. His exams are very straightforward; most of the questions are of similar difficulty to the textbook's problems. Be prepared to spend a bit of time to complete his homework.
Super nice professor. Lectures are organized and helpful, but the textbook is amazing and you could not go to class, study the textbook, and be fine.

sometimes his accent was a tiny bit hard to understand. great professor overall, attendance not mandatory whatsoever and you can succeed in linear without going to class. quizzes every week in recitation though

Very kind and helpful professor outside of class. His lectures can be somewhat difficult to understand, and he does spend a lot of time on proofs, which are not tested. Grading system is fair, but the final was way harder than the 2 midterms.
I love my goat for curving my grade hard even though I did terrible on the final
great professor and very helpful during office hours. although he can be difficult to understand sometimes, he is very informative. fair exams, hw, and quizzes.
BEST PROP EVER, take him
